# Edit list atom

**Data field**

An atom that maps from a time in a movie to a time in a media, and ultimately to media data.

## Overview

See [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/quicktime-file-format/Edit_list_atom].

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this edit atom.
- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
